title: cistus paui
intro: Cistus paui, also known as the Mallorcan rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to the island of Mallorca in the Balearic Islands. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cistus paui include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Cistus paui is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
